name: protective rune
identity: A protective rune intended for installation in the longhouse to provide spiritual protection, possibly blessed by the shaman.
current_status: Active and in place above the longhouse entrance, serving as a spiritual safeguard during the birth and beyond.

description.value: A magical symbol used for protection, often associated with spiritual or ritualistic purposes.

volatile_state.current_activity: Active and in place above the longhouse entrance, serving as a spiritual safeguard during the birth and beyond.
